room.caption: [G2-GreatP7] In the demo version, they could shoot through walls.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(10)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA) //sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA) blackTop=instance_create(0,0,oG2_BlackTop)
eSpawner=instance_create(0,0,oEnemySpawnerA) eSpawner.spawnDelay=150 eSpawner.newEnemySpawn=oWolfHead
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(205) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
